skill1.kitLine: Activates after 12 normal attack(s). Affects all allies. Restores 14.57% of Cover HP.
skill1.note: Cover HP restore — inert for damage dealt; deliberately skipped per note ('Heals/cover restore skipped').

skill1.kitLine: Activates when a Shield is set in front of this unit. Affects all allies. Damage dealt when attacking core ▲ 85.17% for 10 sec.
skill1.where: skill1[0] (trigger fullBurstEnter, target allies, mode 'with shielder', buff coreDamagePct 85.17 / 10s)
skill1.note: Shield-gate is NOT a literal shield-set event: approximated as mode 'with shielder' (default) + fullBurstEnter trigger = assumed full uptime every rotation. Engine has no shield tracking.

skill2.kitLine: Activates after 5 normal attack(s). Affects 2 ally unit(s) with the highest ATK. Damage dealt when attacking core ▲ 40.07% for 5 sec.
skill2.where: skill2[0] (trigger hitCount count 5, target alliesTopAtk count 2, buff coreDamagePct 40.07 / 5s)
skill2.note: Trigger is hitCount=5 counting pellet hits (SG 10 pellets/shot) → near-full uptime; 'kept parser-faithful', auto-filled from offline parser, NOT hand-verified.

skill2.kitLine: Activates after 5 normal attack(s). Affects 2 ally unit(s) with the lowest HP percentage. Recovers 9.58% of the skill user's final Max HP as HP.
skill2.note: Heal — inert for Naga's own damage. ks-extract flags omission violates hard rule 2 (should be a Crown burst-gauge consumer), could affect burst cadence in Crown comps.

burst.kitLine: Affects self. Gains Pierce for 10 sec.
burst.note: Self-Pierce — inert vs partless single boss (scope). ks-extract notes this line was backfilled into unmodeled (previously dropped).

burst.kitLine: Affects all allies. ATK ▲ 16.18% of the skill user's ATK for 10 sec.
burst.where: burst[0] (trigger burstCast, target allies, buff casterAtkPct 16.18 / 10s)
burst.note: Unconditional ATK buff, fires in all modes.

burst.kitLine: Activates if a Shield is set in front of this unit. Affects all allies. ATK ▲ 31.02% of the skill user's ATK for 10 sec.
burst.where: burst[1] (trigger burstCast, target allies, mode 'with shielder', buff casterAtkPct 31.02 / 10s)
burst.note: Shield-gate approximated as mode 'with shielder' (default) — fires UNCONDITIONALLY unless comp set to 'no shielder'; opposite of the kit's shield-presence gate.

documentedConfounds.text: Shield-gated buffs (S1 core-dmg 85.17, burst casterAtk 31.02) are encoded as a MODE defaulting to 'with shielder' that fires UNCONDITIONALLY unless the comp is set to 'no shielder' — the opposite of the kit's shield-presence gate.
documentedConfounds.why: ks-extract identifies this as the 1.175 HOT cause: shield-gated buffs apply by default regardless of actual shield state, overstating damage when no shielder / assuming full uptime.

documentedConfounds.text: S1 core-damage 85.17% trigger is approximated as fullBurstEnter/10s = full uptime, not a literal 'shield set' event.
documentedConfounds.why: Assumes 100% shield uptime every rotation; if real shield uptime is lower, the core-damage buff is overstated.

documentedConfounds.text: S2 heal — Recovers 9.58% of skill user's final Max HP to 2 lowest-HP allies — is unmodeled.
documentedConfounds.why: Inert for Naga's own damage; but ks-extract flags it should be a Crown burst-gauge consumer (hard rule 2), so it could shift burst cadence in Crown comps indirectly.

documentedConfounds.text: S1 cover HP restore (14.57% of Cover HP to all allies) is unmodeled.
documentedConfounds.why: Cover HP does not affect damage dealt; damage-inert.
Inert against the partless single-boss scope; Pierce only matters across multiple targetable parts.

documentedConfounds.text: S2 core-damage trigger uses hitCount=5 counting pellet hits (SG ~1.5 pulls/s × 10 pellets), giving near-full uptime; 'kept parser-faithful'.
documentedConfounds.why: Documented cadence approximation of 'after 5 normal attacks'; differs from literal shot-count but explicitly noted as parser-faithful.

documentedConfounds.text: skill2 was auto-filled from the offline parser (blablalink prose) and is NOT hand-verified (materialized 2026-07-16).
documentedConfounds.why: Provenance caveat — behavior-identical to prior runtime parse but lacks hand verification.

authorIntentSummary: The author modeled Naga's two core-damage buffs (S1 85.17% team core-dmg, S2 40.07% to 2 top-ATK allies) and her two burst ATK buffs (16.18% unconditional + 31.02% shield-gated casterAtk). Because the engine has no shield tracking, the shield-gated lines are encoded behind a 'with shielder' mode that fires by default (fullBurstEnter/10s as a full-uptime proxy for the S1 shield-set trigger), on the rationale that she is always run with a shielder. Heals (S2 HP recover, S1 cover restore) and self-Pierce are deliberately unmodeled as damage-inert. Known-not-faithful spots per the note: the shield-gate is a mode toggle firing unconditionally (opposite of the kit) — flagged in ks-extract as the HOT cause — and the omitted S2 heal should be a Crown burst-gauge consumer.
